NEXUS Force Majeure -- LIFTED


Notice Text:

As posted on March 7, 2026, NEXUS/DTE experienced an unplanned outage.  As a result of the completion of the unplanned outage, effective Gas Day March 10, 2026, all restrictions related with this Force Majeure have been lifted.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.



BackPrint
